base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_death_effect — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1986 castlevania. shared across all enemies. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame enemy-death burst — shared across all enemies; small-flash → cross-spark → wider-spark → fade. Heart-item spawn may follow
